title: The Ugly Duckling (Transformation)
summary: The triumphant moment of self-discovery - hopeful classic narration.
prompt: He bent his head down to the still water, and there, in the shining mirror of the lake, he saw his reflection at last. It was no awkward grey duckling that looked back at him - but a graceful, gleaming white swan. He stretched his long neck, and from somewhere deep in the reeds came a soft chorus: "The new one. Look how beautiful he is." And for the first time in all his life, he was glad to be himself.
